summary: Backfilled the canonical partial live-apply receipt for ADR 0340 after the merged ws-0340 recovery commit updated the stack truth to use `coolify-apps-lv3` as the dedicated deployment server, preserved the Coolify registration and migration-recovery fixes, and recorded that application migration remains pending through the Coolify UI.

verification.check: Dedicated deployment server recorded in canonical stack truth
verification.observed: `versions/stack.yaml` now records `deployment_server_name: coolify-apps-lv3`, `deployment_server_reachable: true`, `deployment_server_usable: true`, and `apps_migration_status: pending_ui`, preserving the honest partial-state contract for platform version `0.130.96`.

Merged commit `26e6849be13d757df637aff4544ebec0c8f02813` records the live-apply recovery findings and carries the repo changes in `playbooks/coolify.yml`, `scripts/coolify_tool.py`, and `tests/test_coolify_tool.py` to handle playbook `chdir`, explicit auth-file wiring, `POST /servers` returning `201`, `destination_uuid` migration fallback, and graceful `422` handling when the Coolify API cannot programmatically move applications.

`docs/adr/0340-dedicated-coolify-apps-vm-separation.md` records ADR 0340 as `Implementation Status: Partial` with repository version `0.178.0` and platform version `0.130.96 (partial — app migration via UI pending)`, matching the current observed stack contract instead of overstating the migration as complete.

notes: This receipt backfills the missing canonical live-apply artifact for ADR 0340 so `versions/stack.yaml` references a real receipt instead of a nonexistent filename.
No new Coolify live mutation was performed as part of the ADR 0300 workstream; this file records the already-merged ADR 0340 partial live apply and its current canonical state.
The dedicated deployment server is live, but application migration remains pending in the Coolify UI because the Coolify API still rejects programmatic server moves with `422`.
